title: SUMMER DAY CAMPS - 211info
text: YMCA OF TILLAMOOK COUNTY SUMMER DAY CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers an action-packed summer playing outdoors, creating arts and crafts, participating in free swim, enjoying healthy snacks, visiting Camp Makuala, and exploring weekly themes, among other activities. With numerous daily activities, your child is sure to have an action-packed and memorable summer. 610 Stillwell Avenue Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Kindergarten through age 10 Hours: Monday - Friday 7:30am-6pm Email (503) 842-9622 107 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 842-9622 Main phone Youth Development Coordinator (503) 842-9622 ext 107 Jessie Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: See website FEES: Contact Youth Development Coordinator for information on fees DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Tillamook County Services: Camps Child Care Providers General Recreational Activities/Sports Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YMCA OF TILLAMOOK COUNTY
